== Landgrove, Vermont ==

Landgrove is a town in Bennington County, Vermont, United States.

=== Geography ===

The town has a total area of 25.1 square miles.

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Header 1 !! Header 2
|-
| Cell 1 || Cell 2
|-
| Cell 3 || Cell 4
|}

[[File:Example.jpg|thumb|A scenic view of Landgrove]]

'''Bold text''' and ''italic text'' are common in wiki markup.
